name: Ink37 - Notification Cleanup
description: Daily cleanup of read (>30d) and unread (>90d) notifications directly via Postgres. No Vercel function invocation needed.

parameters.query: WITH deleted_read AS ( DELETE FROM notification WHERE id IN ( SELECT id FROM notification WHERE "isRead" = true AND "createdAt" < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY "createdAt" ASC LIMIT 1000 ) RETURNING id ), deleted_unread AS ( DELETE FROM notification WHERE id IN ( SELECT id FROM notification WHERE "isRead" = false AND "createdAt" < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' ORDER BY "createdAt" ASC LIMIT 1000 ) RETURNING id ), counts AS ( SELECT (SELECT count(*) FROM deleted_read)::int AS read_deleted, (SELECT count(*) FROM deleted_unread)::int AS unread_deleted ), audit AS ( INSERT INTO audit_log (action, resource, ip, "userAgent", timestamp, metadata) SELECT 'NOTIFICATION_CLEANUP', 'notification', 'system', 'n8n-notification-cleanup-cron', NOW(), jsonb_build_object( 'readDeleted', c.read_deleted, 'unreadDeleted', c.unread_deleted, 'readRetentionDays', 30, 'unreadRetentionDays', 90, 'batchSize', 1000 ) FROM counts c WHERE c.read_deleted > 0 OR c.unread_deleted > 0 RETURNING * ) SELECT * FROM counts;
